commands.name: a11y-audit
commands.description: Scan a frontend project for WCAG 2.2 accessibility violations and optionally auto-fix them.

commands.name: changelog
commands.description: Generate Keep-a-Changelog entries from git history and lint conventional commit messages.

commands.name: code-to-prd
commands.description: Reverse-engineer a frontend or full-stack codebase into a structured PRD.

commands.name: competitive-matrix
commands.description: Build weighted competitive analysis matrices with gap analysis and market positioning maps.

commands.name: financial-health
commands.description: Run financial ratio analysis, DCF valuation, budget variance, and rolling forecasts from JSON data.

commands.name: google-workspace
commands.description: Run Google Workspace CLI diagnostics, security audits, and automation recipes via the gws tool.

commands.name: okr
commands.description: Generate cascading OKRs from company strategy down to team-level objectives with alignment scoring.

commands.name: persona
commands.description: Generate data-driven user personas with goals, frustrations, behaviours, and jobs-to-be-done for UX research.

commands.name: pipeline
commands.description: Detect project stack and generate production-ready CI/CD pipeline configs for GitHub Actions or GitLab CI.

commands.name: plugin-audit
commands.description: Run a comprehensive audit of skills, agents, and commands for structure, quality, security, and compatibility.

commands.name: prd
commands.description: Generate a concise, structured Product Requirements Document for a feature or problem statement.

commands.name: project-health
commands.description: Generate a portfolio health dashboard and risk matrix across multiple projects or workstreams.

commands.name: retro
commands.description: Analyse sprint retrospective data for recurring patterns and generate trackable action items.

commands.name: rice
commands.description: Score and rank product features using the RICE framework (Reach, Impact, Confidence, Effort) with capacity planning.

commands.name: saas-health
commands.description: Calculate SaaS health metrics (ARR, MRR, churn, CAC, LTV, NRR, quick ratio) and benchmark against industry standards.

commands.name: scroll-stop-build
commands.description: Takes a product video and builds a production-quality Apple-style scroll-driven website.

commands.name: scroll-stop-prompt
commands.description: Generate three coordinated AI prompts for scroll-stopping product content.

commands.name: seo-auditor
commands.description: Scan documentation and README files for SEO issues and apply fixes.

commands.name: seo-strategy
commands.description: Two-mode SEO skill — single article optimisation or site-wide audit with action plan.

commands.name: sprint-health
commands.description: Score sprint health and analyse velocity trends with statistical confidence intervals.

commands.name: sprint-plan
commands.description: Generate a sprint plan with capacity allocation, user stories, and acceptance criteria.

commands.name: sync-knowledge-base
commands.description: Scan all installed commands, agents and skills, push changes to GitHub, update Notion documentation hub.

commands.name: tdd
commands.description: Generate test suites, analyse code coverage, and run TDD workflows for any language.

commands.name: tech-debt
commands.description: Scan, prioritise, and report technical debt across a codebase with effort/impact scoring.

commands.name: user-story
commands.description: Generate INVEST-compliant user stories with Given/When/Then acceptance criteria and story point estimates.

agents.name: cs-agile-product-owner
agents.description: Sprint-level execution specialist for user stories, sprint planning, and backlog grooming with RICE scoring.

agents.name: cs-ceo-advisor
agents.description: CEO-level strategic advisor for company vision, board prep, fundraising, and executive decision frameworks.

agents.name: cs-content-creator
agents.description: Content production specialist for SEO-optimised blog posts, social media, email copy, and landing pages.

agents.name: cs-cto-advisor
agents.description: CTO-level technical leadership advisor for technology strategy, engineering scaling, and architecture governance.

agents.name: cs-demand-gen-specialist
agents.description: Demand generation and paid acquisition specialist for lead gen, CAC analysis, and multi-channel acquisition.

agents.name: cs-devops
agents.description: DevOps and Infrastructure Engineer for cloud architecture, Terraform, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipeline design.

agents.name: cs-engineering-lead
agents.description: Engineering Team Lead for cross-functional coordination, tech stack evaluation, and incident response.

agents.name: cs-financial-analyst
agents.description: Financial Analyst for DCF valuation, financial modelling, SaaS metrics, and unit economics projections.

agents.name: cs-growth-strategist
agents.description: Growth Strategist for revenue operations, churn prevention, pipeline analysis, and GTM strategy.

agents.name: cs-product-analyst
agents.description: Product Analytics specialist for KPI definition, A/B experiment design, funnel analysis.

agents.name: cs-product-manager
agents.description: Product Management specialist for feature prioritisation, customer discovery, PRD development, and roadmap planning.

agents.name: cs-product-strategist
agents.description: Product Strategy specialist for OKR planning, competitive landscape, product vision, and market positioning.

agents.name: cs-project-manager
agents.description: Project Manager for sprint planning, Jira/Confluence workflows, Scrum ceremonies, and stakeholder reporting.

agents.name: cs-quality-regulatory
agents.description: Quality & Regulatory specialist for ISO 13485, EU MDR, FDA submissions, GDPR, and ISO 27001 audits.

agents.name: cs-senior-engineer
agents.description: Senior Engineer for architecture decisions, system design, code review, and security hardening.

agents.name: cs-sre
agents.description: Site Reliability Engineer for SLO/SLI definition, error budget management, and on-call process design.

agents.name: cs-ux-researcher
agents.description: UX Research specialist for research planning, persona generation, journey mapping, and usability test design.

agents.name: cs-workspace-admin
agents.description: Google Workspace administrator using the gws CLI for automation, security audits, and user provisioning.
